calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-25-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Sanction issued on SEP-25-2019 are vacated in open court. Order to Show Cause re: dismissal(CRC 3.1385) continued to FEB-25-2020. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND K. WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2019 Continued To Nov-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Trevor J. Howard, Esq. appearing for defendant. No appearance by plaintiff. Plaintiff's counsel E. Higginbotham, Esq. is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-19-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court issues notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-24-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
